textByHash.0f08595d1de9da2f8452664ba590d2db4e6fd080: The Fremennik council of elders? I am pleased to say that I am. My value as a huntsman is recognised by my position there.
textByHash.a0611ce75515a35ea21745959657bef1de4a81fb: You? ... well... I am not totally against the idea outerlander. If you can demonstrate some hunting skills then perhaps I may offer my vote.
textByHash.fc3e65a024e44e9654f00151ba40404fd55afb91: Chickens? You think that would impress me?
textByHash.f2dac3f2e481c4a43afa6c47a2681857cba68225: No. The prey I have in mind for you to prove your worth to me is something far more dangerous. Far more difficult. Far more deadly.
textByHash.5c1eb051b3d915c03f90c1bad2adb355c3e39883: I suspect you are mocking me outerlander. You will need to prove your skill as a hunter to me by tracking and defeating... The Draugen.
textByHash.352c8d97c1b9b0a0df8f213853612b3d7b270602: Hmmm. No, the words are slightly similar I suppose, but they are very different creatures.
textByHash.021a2bcf80e8cb9b6cbdbead52264139448d4301: The Draugen is an evil ghost from Fremennik mythology, that devours the souls of those brave warriors who meet their ends at sea.
textByHash.ab4e1c3ccdcb472bdb6be477b41ee9d47fd603a3: It stalks the coastlines, invisible to all. It brings us bad fortunes, and curses our journeys across the seas. It is also unkillable by normal means.
textByHash.03df0730609585d586fcf4f258cad2aed16c3c69: Well outerlander, should you accept my challenge I will show you a special hunter's trick that will help you. Do you accept the challenge?
textByHash.e0cc8f379a209b84d8c973e5952a2a381025951f: Not at all outerlander. The Draugen is indeed impossible to kill, but that is not the same as being impossible to fight against.
textByHash.4899ea1cc914b316bcb6852623d06af60670ed8f: Every time he takes a Fremennik life, he gains in power, so to keep it from becoming too powerful we hunters hunt it and steal its life force.
textByHash.91c1d3b5b22b6f627ac94c876b39e8d9ef3a8582: To defeat the Draugen you will need a special item; I have one to give you but it seems as though your inventory is too full to accept it.
textByHash.52371dde51cd68e3fc62904cfec44be668065fca: We do this with a special talisman. Here, take it; it will let you track the Draugen while it's invisible, and when you defeat it will absorb its essence.
textByHash.4165101388987711e7153029fbeec2fa0a9aa06b: I want you to track the Draugen, defeat it, and store its essence in that talisman for me. If you can do this important task for my clan, I will vote for you.
textByHash.4854b69d97054def625f6461ebfba2c425510e35: Take care of the talisman, and see me when you have completed this task.
textByHash.8b64f7a46a3c46bd909c79b54965852f2821fc92: Hello again outerlander. Have you managed to hunt down the terrible Draugen yet?
textByHash.981ca991d7b09ed30842bd508f0f7a89a1a0915c: Hmmm. Laziness is not a trait that I admire. I suggest you go and do so if you wish me to vouchsafe for you to our council of elders.
textByHash.b54dda61708fc244b3b3ffa490017899af951c81: The typical careless regard for valuable objects I would expect from an outerlander such as yourself. Do not lose THIS one.
textByHash.193d5bc9fd64d6d9e605ec0ab2c1d43b9172b2d5: I saw the entire hunt. Let me take that talisman from you; I would be honoured to speak out for you to our council of elders after such a hunt, outerlander.
textByHash.6d15797b4d78bef6e73182691722368c62460e75: Absolutely outerlander! Anyone brave enough to hunt and defeat the Draugen will be a great addition to our clan!
textByHash.e0fbfbcaac349c9288e6f30054b9ed56615bce5d: Well, of course I do. I wouldn't be much of a huntsman if I didn't know where to find my prey now, would I outerlander?
textByHash.f2c03f0dc2720a09fb5586744cb68cb4d03a0146: Directions to my hunting grounds could mean the end of my livelihood. The only way I would be prepared to give them up would be...
textByHash.bd16c9e2c3f1baf93431b43394a06f45462169df: ...a new string for my hunting bow. Not just any bowstring; I need a custom bowstring, balanced for my bow precisely to keep my hunt competitive.
textByHash.0e720ca4e3d864a2b874cd7a8ee526d349ad4497: Only in this way would I allow the knowledge of my hunting grounds to be passed on to strangers.
textByHash.d620a7bfc5b4ef43a77faf74d282f8c261ef6f7c: I have no idea. But then again, I'm happy with my old bowstring and being the only person who knows where my hunting ground is.
textByHash.1e8ff3d17ec5a8df0e17cf59784e72169f57cec2: Well met, outerlander. I see some hunting potential within you. Here, take my map, I was getting too dependent on it for my skill anyway.
textByHash.078e73422c61eafb1e57bf54837c0185d26e5b76: No outerlander... it is hard to explain. That map makes my role as huntsman too easy. I fear my skills are becoming dulled. Now I must track my prey once more.
textByHash.020d5b006da4f2d4b9da06d5ceb0132efb1f95d7: To begin again from scratch... I feel this may keep me sharp.
textByHash.1d71612e34dfa1c5a71971f5ef608ea86912e3f4: I do not speak to outerlanders. If you have anything of import to say, go and speak to the Chieftain.
textByHash.2730fd910a99140efebfd09c652a0e3cf649f5eb: My apologies outerlander, but we are forbidden by decree to communicate with those not of our tribe, and this includes making armour for you.
textByHash.4b216e3ceff5ababdb405ec212349421ae303f63: I suggest you speak to Brundt, our chieftain. He resides in the longhall and speaks for us all.
textByHash.785cfe5018487ae2f931e66f8ab0f2c93825a58a: Hello again to you . How goes the hunt?
textByHash.a9949fb5a83facefba64ab8576f26d5a400c5bf2: You think so do you? The Draugen is always out there, just as I and my hunters are always on its trail to keep it at bay.
textByHash.555201e46a00ff1698c05c0595fc624ed35e5992: The hunt will never end until I do.
textByHash.eb11c6071bc0986b65b5d01aee9436d900559ff7: That is fine. What type of armour were you looking for?
textByHash.d078bbd7f681aeb4eedaae62cec95306e29f1b11: It will cost you 5,000 coins to make that for you. Is that acceptable?
textByHash.7fb6c2acfe4dc23c4e342f1a6b3acd494bd849d1: Sorry. I will need 1 piece of dark dagger-mouth hide, 1 circular light dagger-mouth hide and 5,000 coins to make you a hunter's helmet.
textByHash.ada6c30359cc3ef5f544e9a2283910f1d0e04105: When you have them, I will still be here.
textByHash.271c47df8220250f977c8a7719f7dc480d28c2c0: It will cost you 10,000 coins to make that for you. Is that acceptable?
textByHash.cd8680cc89a5fab8918f46a3e351aa91dcf40375: I'm sorry, but I need 3 pieces of dark dagger-mouth hide, 1 flattened hide and 10,000 coins to make you some hunter's body armour.
textByHash.54a0330c05d8c973d2d8dcbd063bc63bd9611913: I will still be here when you have obtained it.
textByHash.8e8bbc70222c00c06d974393eb0ef6d82bb69c22: It will cost you 7,500 coins to make that for you. Is that acceptable?
textByHash.8d975624e40790f592939d662d9d07b3d3e12b8f: That should do for any hunter! Did you want another set of hunters legs?
textByHash.dad3fba4de385180b809484aa98167c9caaf8631: My apologies but I will need 2 pieces of dark dagger-mouth hide, 1 stretched hide and 7,500 coins to make you some leg armour...
